top_signals.title: Germany to deploy Patriot battery to Turkey, relieving US forces on NATO’s southeastern flank
top_signals.summary: Germany’s contribution to intercepting Iranian missiles is framed in Berlin as an exercise in burden-sharing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mustafa Suleyman-founded Inflection AI to return to London
top_signals.summary: Silicon Valley startup Inflection AI is marking a return to London as the company forges ahead with its expansion plans, City AM can reveal. The artificial intelligence business was launched in 2022 by Deepmind co-founder Mustafa Suleyman and attracted early backing from Linkedin founder Reid Hoffman. It released its own large language model, Pi, and [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 50% of Japan’s bank deposits held in greater Tokyo area
top_signals.summary: The combined deposits in the capital and Kanagawa, Saitama and Chiba prefectures stood at ¥523.1 trillion as of March 31 this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
